# External upstream pins

| Path | Repository | ADR |
|------|------------|-----|
| [`daemon-system-ontology/`](daemon-system-ontology/) | [daemon-system-ontology](https://github.com/daemon-blockint-tech/daemon-system-ontology.git) (git submodule) | [MERGE-STRATEGY-01](../docs/architecture/adr-merge-strategy-01.md) |

Clone with submodules:

```bash
git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/daemon-blockint-tech/DAEMON.git
# or after clone:
git submodule update --init --recursive
```
